activation_gate: Deferred. Activate only after the current ComfyUI foundation, Wave70 Mask Factory, Waves71-76 base physics/deformation layers, runtime lanes, cost controls, and strict QA gates are stable enough that this expansion will not derail nearer project milestones. Activation requires an explicit source-cited project decision.

external_references.name: AWS G7e production GPU runtime
external_references.usage: Production self-hosted LLM/VLM and heavy adapter execution target; use with explicit runtime windows and cost controls.

external_references.name: vLLM model serving
external_references.usage: Candidate high-throughput self-hosted inference server for supervisor, code, and multimodal models.

external_references.name: Qwen VL family
external_references.usage: Candidate self-hosted visual review model family for overlays, frame grids, maps, and generated artifacts.

external_references.name: Blender command line
external_references.usage: Primary autonomous production fitting, rigging, map baking, support-surface, and overlay backend.

external_references.name: SideFX Houdini batch workflow
external_references.usage: Advanced procedural, Vellum, SDF, pressure, contact, and tissue simulation backend.

external_references.name: Unreal Python automation
external_references.usage: Realtime proof, Control Rig, Chaos, Deformer Graph, ML Deformer, and render-pass automation backend.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer Python API
external_references.usage: Garment, blanket, sheet, fabric tension, cloth stretch, and cloth/body collision backend.

external_references.name: Substance Automation Toolkit
external_references.usage: Batch material, normal, roughness, displacement, curvature, AO, pressure, wrinkle, fabric, and tension map baking.

external_references.name: Maya command line and Python
external_references.usage: Production rigging, skinning, blendshape, pose-space deformation, muscle, Bifrost, and validation backend.

external_references.name: MotionBuilder Python SDK
external_references.usage: Mocap, retargeting, HumanIK, characterization, takes, story, relation constraints, and batch FBX animation handling.

external_references.name: Cascadeur Python scripting
external_references.usage: Optional physics-aware animation cleanup, balance, AutoPosing, AutoPhysics, contact timing, and motion plausibility backend.

external_references.name: ZBrush ZScript
external_references.usage: Offline/source asset creation for universal base sculpt, alphas, pores, wrinkles, displacement, and corrective sculpt references.

purpose: Define the full no-human-work state machine from registered DAZ neutral prototype through production fitting, tissue inference, maps, tools, ComfyUI package, generation, QA, blockers, and release evidence.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: registered_daz_to_work_order_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, state manifest, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence registered_daz_to_work_order_state. It must support validate source hashes, neutral pose, metadata, reference renders, and allowed use before any automated processing, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: validate source hashes, neutral pose, metadata, reference renders, and allowed use before any automated processing. Required output: state manifest.
requirements.title: Start registered DAZ work order state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: production_fit_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, fit state evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence production_fit_state. It must support invoke W82 fitting, invariant gates, detail transfer, heatmaps, and fit QA, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: invoke W82 fitting, invariant gates, detail transfer, heatmaps, and fit QA. Required output: fit state evidence.
requirements.title: Run production fit state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: tissue_inference_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, tissue state evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence tissue_inference_state. It must support invoke W79 tissue class, mass, stiffness, damping, sag, jiggle, compression, and confidence scoring, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: invoke W79 tissue class, mass, stiffness, damping, sag, jiggle, compression, and confidence scoring. Required output: tissue state evidence.
requirements.title: Run tissue inference state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: rig_collision_map_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, rig collision state evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence rig_collision_map_state. It must support invoke W73 plus W80/W81 maps for rig, collision, gravity, support, muscle, grip, and contact, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: invoke W73 plus W80/W81 maps for rig, collision, gravity, support, muscle, grip, and contact. Required output: rig collision state evidence.
requirements.title: Run rig collision map state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: simulation_adapter_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, adapter state evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence simulation_adapter_state. It must support select and execute Blender, Houdini, Unreal, Maya, Marvelous, Substance, MotionBuilder, Cascadeur, or fallback routes, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: select and execute Blender, Houdini, Unreal, Maya, Marvelous, Substance, MotionBuilder, Cascadeur, or fallback routes. Required output: adapter state evidence.
requirements.title: Run simulation adapter state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: comfyui_conditioning_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, ComfyUI package evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence comfyui_conditioning_state. It must support package pose, depth, normal, mask, segmentation, contact, deformation, support, muscle, force, and temporal maps, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: package pose, depth, normal, mask, segmentation, contact, deformation, support, muscle, force, and temporal maps. Required output: ComfyUI package evidence.
requirements.title: Run ComfyUI conditioning state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: generation_and_qa_state is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, generation QA evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence generation_and_qa_state. It must support generate proof artifacts and perform full visual, video, audio, geometry, physics, and ledger QA, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: generate proof artifacts and perform full visual, video, audio, geometry, physics, and ledger QA. Required output: generation QA evidence.
requirements.title: Run generation and QA state

requirements.acceptance_criteria: missing_tool_fallback_policy is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, fallback policy evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence missing_tool_fallback_policy. It must support fallback from specialist tool to Blender/Houdini/Maya/ComfyUI approximation or blocker without looping, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: fallback from specialist tool to Blender/Houdini/Maya/ComfyUI approximation or blocker without looping. Required output: fallback policy evidence.
requirements.title: Define missing tool fallback policy

requirements.acceptance_criteria: license_unavailable_blocker_policy is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, license blocker evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence license_unavailable_blocker_policy. It must support write exact blocker and continue eligible local-first work when paid tool/license is unavailable, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: write exact blocker and continue eligible local-first work when paid tool/license is unavailable. Required output: license blocker evidence.
requirements.title: Define license unavailable blocker policy

requirements.acceptance_criteria: low_confidence_blocker_policy is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, low confidence blocker evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence low_confidence_blocker_policy. It must support block when geometry/tissue/contact/visual review is uncertain rather than guessing physics parameters, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: block when geometry/tissue/contact/visual review is uncertain rather than guessing physics parameters. Required output: low confidence blocker evidence.
requirements.title: Define low confidence blocker policy

requirements.acceptance_criteria: retry_budget_policy is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, retry budget report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence retry_budget_policy. It must support bounded reruns only when changed input, changed parameter, or new evidence exists, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: bounded reruns only when changed input, changed parameter, or new evidence exists. Required output: retry budget report.
requirements.title: Define retry budget policy

requirements.acceptance_criteria: no_housekeeping_loop_policy is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, no-loop evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence no_housekeeping_loop_policy. It must support avoid repeated docs, indexes, validators, hydration, and evidence churn without new implementation/runtime/QA inputs, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: avoid repeated docs, indexes, validators, hydration, and evidence churn without new implementation/runtime/QA inputs. Required output: no-loop evidence.
requirements.title: Define no housekeeping loop policy

requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence physics_work_order_manifest. It must support single manifest tying prototype, production base, tools, adapters, maps, generated media, QA, and tracker rows, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.

requirements.title: Build physics work order manifest

requirements.acceptance_criteria: artifact_hash_chain is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, hash chain manifest, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence artifact_hash_chain. It must support hash every input, intermediate map, simulation cache, texture, render pass, ComfyUI package, output media, and QA report, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.

requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence source_citation_to_tracker_linker. title: End To End Autonomous Physics Work Order Orchestration
